title: Cassava Leaf Nucleic Acid Extraction
author: Devang Mehta
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iavcae6
materials: To each tube add ~200mg of leaf material
Continue with the following steps for RNA precipitation

steps.title: Prepare 1
steps.instruction: Prepare 1.5ml tube by adding a few glass beads.

steps.title: Freeze in liquid N2 and grind using a homogeniser
steps.instruction: Freeze in liquid N2 and grind using a homogeniser

steps.title: Prepare CTAB buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare CTAB buffer: Add 2% beta-mercaptoethanol to the CTAB buffer just before use (200ul/10ml)CTAB Buffer: 2% CTAB 2% PVP-40 100mM Tris-HCL pH 8.0 25mM EDTA-Na 2M NaCl 0.5g/L spermidine Make up to required volume with DEPC treated water. Incubate for 1h at RT and then autoclave

steps.title: Add 1ml CTAB buffer to the...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml CTAB buffer to the sample, mix, incubate 15min at 50°C

steps.title: Centrifuge 5min full speed, transfer 900ul...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5min full speed, transfer 900ul supernatant to fresh 2ml tube

steps.title: Add 900 ul Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1),...
steps.instruction: Add 900 ul Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1), mix, centrifuge for 10min full speed

steps.title: Transfer 800ul supernatant to fresh tube...
steps.instruction: Transfer 800ul supernatant to fresh tube and add equal volume of Chloroform:isoamy alcohol (24:1), mix, centrifuge 10 min full speed

steps.title: Incubate at -80°C for 30 min or at -20C overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate at -80°C for 30 min or at -20C overnight.

steps.title: Centrifuge 30 min full speed at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 30 min full speed at 4°C

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Wash the pellet in 1 ml 80% ETOH
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet in 1 ml 80% ETOH

steps.title: Centrifuge 5min and vacuum dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5min and vacuum dry the pellet.

steps.title: Dissolve the pellet in 100 ul DEPC-treated water
steps.instruction: Dissolve the pellet in 100 ul DEPC-treated water. *continue on ice

steps.title: Measure the DNA concentration using a NanoDrop
steps.instruction: Measure the DNA concentration using a NanoDrop.

steps.title: Pipette out as much total NA as required
steps.instruction: Pipette out as much total NA as required.

steps.title: Add 1/5th volume of 10M LiCl
steps.instruction: Add 1/5th volume of 10M LiCl

steps.title: Incubate at -20 for at least 1 hour
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20 for at least 1 hour

steps.title: Centrifuge full speed (4C) for 30 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge full speed (4C) for 30 min

steps.title: Wash with 80% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash with 80% EtOH

steps.title: Centrifuge 5min at 4000 rpm, at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5min at 4000 rpm, at 4C, and vacuum dry the pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend in 30-50ul of H20
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 30-50ul of H20

steps.title: Transfer 650ul supernatant to fresh 1
steps.instruction: Transfer 650ul supernatant to fresh 1.5 ml tube, add 390 ul (0.6 volume) cold EtOH
